description: Trace S3 multipart upload from boto3 through s3transfer to botocore

dependency_chain.relationship: boto3 S3 resource upload_file delegates to s3transfer TransferManager
s3transfer MultipartUploader calls botocore client for CreateMultipartUpload/UploadPart/CompleteMultipartUpload

integration_path: boto3 S3 resource upload_file called with file path and optional TransferConfig
boto3 S3Transfer delegates to s3transfer TransferManager.upload
TransferManager checks multipart_threshold to decide single vs multipart upload
MultipartUploader splits file into chunks and submits UploadPart tasks concurrently
Each UploadPart task calls botocore S3 client upload_part operation
After all parts complete, CompleteMultipartUpload is called via botocore client
botocore serializes API calls to HTTP requests with retry logic
